title: pteridium esculentum subsp. esculentum
intro: Pteridium esculentum subsp. esculentum, also known as bracken fern, is a species of fern that grows widely in many parts of the world. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been used to treat various health conditions such as arthritis, digestive issues, and skin problems. The health benefits of bracken fern include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy among traditional healers. Bracken fern can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
